Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx basic,$0801,$ffff "TUTANKHAM-4000" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Tutankham (LC Games - 2022).prg"
Metadata.Notes: The following changes were made to remove highscore loading and saving to disk: 1. Changed the JSR $FFBD instruction at $4435 to RTS 2. Changed the JSR $FFBD instruction at $4450 to RTS 3. Changed the JSR $FFBD instruction at $4475 to RTS
